label: Transparent leafy seadragon motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Seadragon transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a leafy seadragon motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete full-body subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A single leafy seadragon with accurate slender seahorse-like anatomy, long delicate snout, tiny fins, curling tail, and many leaf-shaped appendages. Palette must be olive gold, kelp ochre, muted seaweed green, warm leaf-vein gold, and small teal blue-green highlights. It must read clearly as a real leafy seadragon, not a regular seahorse, pipefish, eel, dragon, fantasy creature, or generic fish.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; horizontal 3/4 profile, graceful floating posture, all appendages visible, no cropping. Clean studio lighting that preserves natural texture and crisp opaque leaf edges. No cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Critical edge constraints: every body part and fin must be opaque natural olive/gold/teal, with no translucent membrane showing the magenta background through it. No magenta highlights, no magenta dorsal comb, no pink/purple fringe, no background-colored details.
Constraints: no kelp meadow background, no bubbles, no sand, no rocks, no water scene, no second animal, no props, no text, no watermark.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Seadragon light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive LIGHT MODE design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Seadragon", derived from the visible leafy seadragon motif cutout. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI theme.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, target 3840x2160 pixels, clean professional design-system presentation with readable labels.
Required visible title text: "Morphous Seadragon" and subtitle "Leafy Seadragon / delicate discovery system".
Required visible sections: Palette, Typography (EN), Typography (JP), Components, Navigation, Dashboard / Data, Charts, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Alerts / Status, Cards, Empty State, Loading State, Error State, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Reference use: Extract color, texture rhythm, spacing mood, and interaction language from the leafy seadragon motif: olive gold body armor, kelp meadow shadows, translucent leaf appendages, warm leaf-vein gold, muted seaweed olive, lagoon teal highlights, pearly snout accents, delicate floating discovery.
Palette labels to show: Drift Ivory #F4F0DA, Kelp Ink #1F2718, Leaf Gold #C89D24, Olive Frond #7B812A, Lagoon Teal #2F8C86, Meadow Moss #A8A66A, Pearl Vein #E9DFC0, Deep Kelp #263924.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; use labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/destructive/outline/ghost buttons, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, popover/menu, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, area chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, small seadragon/leaf icons.
Style: delicate discovery product system for kelp meadow field notes and observations; precise 8px grid; 8px card radius; light ivory surfaces, kelp ink text, leaf-gold primary actions, lagoon-teal focus rings and chart lines, olive-frond secondary controls, pearly vein dividers, subtle leaf appendage texture.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no cartoon fantasy dragon, no aquarium brand, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Seadragon", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Seadragon dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive DARK MODE design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Seadragon". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible leafy seadragon motif cutout.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, target 3840x2160 pixels, clean professional design-system presentation with readable labels.
Required visible title text: "Morphous Seadragon", subtitle "Leafy Seadragon / delicate discovery system", and a visible "Dark Mode" label.
Required visible sections: Palette, Typography (EN), Typography (JP), Components, Navigation, Dashboard / Data, Charts, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Alerts / Status, Cards, Empty State, Loading State, Error State, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Reference use: Preserve the same system language as the visible light board: leafy seadragon cutout, olive gold body armor, kelp meadow shadows, translucent leaf appendages, warm leaf-vein gold, muted seaweed olive, lagoon teal highlights, pearly snout accents, delicate floating discovery, precise shadcn/tweakcn grid.
Palette labels to show: Kelp Ink #1F2718, Deep Kelp #263924, Drift Ivory #F4F0DA, Leaf Gold #C89D24, Olive Frond #7B812A, Lagoon Teal #2F8C86, Meadow Moss #A8A66A, Pearl Vein #E9DFC0.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; use labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible on dark kelp surfaces.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/destructive/outline/ghost buttons, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, popover/menu, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, area chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, small seadragon/leaf icons.
Visual details: deep kelp ink background, dark olive cards, drift-ivory foregrounds, leaf-gold primary actions, lagoon-teal focus rings and chart lines, olive-frond secondary controls, pearl-vein dividers, subtle leafy appendage texture overlays, crisp 8px card radius.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure-black-only flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no cartoon fantasy dragon, no aquarium brand, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Seadragon", no illegible tiny paragraphs.
